name: Honey Almond Grilling Glaze
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan over medium heat, melt 3 tablespoons butter.
Whisk in flour until smooth, about 1 minute.
2. Set aside the butter and flour mixture.
3. In an 10-inch skillet over high heat, melt the remaining 8 tablespoons butter.
4. When it comes to a hard sizzle, add almonds, Seafood Magic, and celery.
5. Cook, stirring frequently at first and constantly near the end of cooking time,
about 8 minutes or until almonds are browned.
6. Stir in honey and cook, stirring frequently, about 1 minute.
7. Stir in lemon peel and stock. Cook, stirring occasionally, about 8 minutes.
8. Add nutmeg; cook for 3 minutes, stirring occasionally.
9. Whisk in the reserved butter and flour mixture until it is incorporated
and the sauce is slightly thickened, about 30-60 seconds.
10. Remove from heat.
NOTE: Excellent on grilled seafood, chicken, or pork. Brush onto meat just before it's ready to come off the grill and bring some to the table for dipping.
